name: Demo FC
tagline: Your Club, Your Story — Powered by Touchline
kitDescription: Home: blue shirts, white shorts. Away: white shirts, blue shorts.
homeBanner: This is a demo club showing what your site could look like on the Touchline Clubs Platform. Edit your club.json to make it your own.

about.title: A Fresh Start
about.text: Demo FC is a template club used to showcase the Touchline Clubs Platform. Replace this with your own story.

about.title: Community First
about.text: Every club has its own identity, history and ambitions. Your About page is the place to tell that story.

about.title: Built for Growth
about.text: From a single side to dozens of teams across age groups, the platform scales with your club.

about.title: Everyone Welcome
about.text: Customise sections to reflect what makes your club unique.

history: This is example content for Demo FC. The platform lets you write your own history here, using HTML if needed.
Each club on the platform gets its own customisable JSON files for content, plus an admin UI for live editing.
Replace this text with your own history to bring the page to life.
